caption: A man wearing a white short-sleeved shirt is seen inside a vehicle, sitting in the passenger seat and interacting with another person who is partially visible in the driver's seat. As the sequence progresses, the man in white reaches toward the driver, and their hands appear to meet in a handshake or a gesture of interaction. The video is presented as a news broadcast with a red and yellow "BREAKING NEWS" banner across the bottom. A red header displays the text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". On the left side, there is a portrait of an older man with the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and on the right, a section labeled "मंत्री" includes portraits and names of "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी." A timestamp in the bottom right corner reads "10:07 PM" next to a "MAHAARTH" logo.
